intent.raw: Design an impactful, easy-to-understand UX and completely rewrite the copy because the prior concept was not understood by everyone.
intent.objective: Produce a governed six-view UX design and complete interactive-web copy deck that explains the Resonant Time Capsule quickly without implementing, publishing, or widening safety claims.
intent.target_artifact: Time Capsule UX clarity design and web copy package
intent.operator_sentence: Make the concept understandable before asking people to participate.

subagent_strategy.explanation: The operator requested two parent-executed authoring skills; one bounded evidence corpus and one composition owner are sufficient.

steps.name: Build bounded clarity context
stop_conditions: Any claim, audience need, safety boundary, or current-surface observation lacks a source or explicit gap.

steps.name: Select design and copy transports
stop_conditions: The chosen template cannot represent six views, interactive states, or complete copy coverage.

steps.name: Design the comprehension architecture
stop_conditions: The design forces a word, conflates number selection with later openings, or implies live privacy, rewards, or collection.

steps.name: Reduce and prove the design unit
stop_conditions: The selected unit cannot recompose into the complete story or absorbs implementation-owner authority.

steps.name: Compose the complete interactive-web copy
stop_conditions: Copy becomes coercive, abstract before concrete, reward-like, technically false, or incomplete across interaction states.

steps.name: Validate and transport the candidate
stop_conditions: The package claims proven comprehension without first-time participant evidence.

gates.condition: Product name, timing, word limits, optionality, reward boundary, and rehearsal state match approved define outputs.
One clear narrative and one progressive form recompose into the full concept without absorbing implementation authority.
Copy implies no personal reward, compulsory word, live submission, sealed protection, or proven fairness.
The five-person retell thresholds in UX-PLAN.md pass on an implemented candidate.
Source mutation and browser implementation require a separately authorized Task Session.

state_namespaces.owner: future Task Session and live-intake owners
state_namespaces.write_policy: Read-only; no source mutation, deployment, or collection in this dispatch.

promotion_splits.rule: Author review cannot replace first-time participant retell, accessibility, safety, and operator approval.

promotion_guardrails: Do not claim the new explanation has succeeded before the comprehension test runs.
Do not enable collection, persistence, identity, saved-for-later protection, deployment, or token effects from this design dispatch.
